input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 1.1.5 tests reference org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, and TypedProps; these classes are absent from pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1, so generated tests should not carry those APIs forward.
Pekko typed actors are covered by the separate pekko-actor-typed_2.13 module; adding that dependency would test a different artifact and is not required for pekko-actor_2.13 coverage.

If tests deliberately exercise DNS resolver internals, they may need the existing --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED style setup, but this is optional for meaningful actor coverage and should not be added unless the generated tests require it.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 resolves with only scala-library and typesafe-config transitive dependencies, and the Classic Actors documentation uses pekko-actor directly. Meaningful coverage is reachable with ActorSystem, Props, ActorRef, dispatchers, serialization/config, and lifecycle APIs without Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or mandatory environment/system properties.
